sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: VHC - Virnetx Holding Latest Stock News & Market Updates
feed.summary: This page provides the latest news and updates on Virnetx Holding (VHC), an Internet security software and technology company specializing in patented Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA) and secure communications. Recent news highlights include VirnetX securing a GSA Schedule contract, transferring its stock listing to Nasdaq, obtaining Department of Defense security certifications, and participating in military exercises like RIMPAC 2024 to demonstrate its secure communication technologies. The company is strategically focusing on the U.S. Department of Defense and Intelligence Community, with updates on leadership changes and ongoing collaborations.

feed.title: TWO Receives Unsolicited Proposal
feed.summary: TWO (Two Harbors Investment Corp.) has received an unsolicited proposal to acquire all outstanding shares for $10.70 per share in cash, plus the $25.4 million termination fee owed to UWM Holdings Corporation (UWMC). An ad hoc committee of TWO's Board of Directors has determined this proposal could reasonably lead to a "Company Superior Proposal" under the UWMC merger agreement. The UWMC merger agreement remains in effect, and the Board continues to recommend the UWMC transaction, with a Special Meeting of Stockholders still scheduled for March 24, 2026.

feed.title: $6B in new venues: VENU plans 20 entertainment sites in 5 years
feed.summary: Venu Holding Corporation (VENU) CEO J.W. Roth announced during an interview on Schwab Network's Opening Bell that the company plans to develop 20 new entertainment venues, representing an estimated $6 billion in development over the next five years. This expansion is fueled by a recent capital raise of $86.25 million, which surpassed the initial $75 million target due to strong investor interest. VENU aims to solidify its position as a leader in the live entertainment infrastructure with a focus on capital efficiency and long-term value creation.

feed.title: The Home Depot Teams Up with David Beckham to Bring the FIFA World Cup 2026™ To Backyards Across the Country
feed.summary: The Home Depot has partnered with David Beckham to bring the excitement of the FIFA World Cup 2026™ to fans' backyards across the country. The campaign includes sweepstakes, exclusive in-store and online offers, FIFA Fan Festivals featuring "Beckham's Backyard" immersive spaces, and soccer-themed workshops. This initiative aims to help fans create the ultimate watch party experience at home while celebrating the upcoming major event.

feed.title: New BZPACK mSiC® Power Modules Are Designed for Demanding Applications in Harsh Environments
feed.summary: Microchip Technology has introduced its new BZPACK mSiC® power modules, engineered to meet rigorous HV-H3TRB standards for demanding power-conversion environments. These modules offer exceptional reliability, versatile system integration, and streamline manufacturing with their compact, baseplate-less design and various topology options. Leveraging Microchip's advanced mSiC technology, the BZPACK modules are suited for industrial and renewable energy applications, providing superior insulation, thermal management, and long-term durability.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target on Amgen to $390 From $375, Maintains Equalweight Rating
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has increased its price target for Amgen (AMGN) to $390 from $375, while reiterating an Equalweight rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook for the biotechnology giant. Amgen's stock information, company profile, and other related news are also provided.

feed.title: EagleNXT eBee VISION ISR Drone Selected by U.S. Army for advanced training
feed.summary: The U.S. Army has selected EagleNXT's eBee VISION Unmanned Aircraft System (UAS) for advanced training purposes, acquiring two systems to improve hands-on unmanned systems training and operator proficiency. The eBee VISION is a lightweight, NDAA-compliant fixed-wing drone designed for rapid deployment and enhanced situational awareness, featuring long endurance, real-time high-resolution video, and a portable design. This acquisition reinforces EagleNXT's growing role in U.S. defense training, helping to prepare soldiers for multi-domain operations through realistic unmanned training scenarios focused on intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance (ISR).

feed.title: U.S. Army buys two backpack-size drones for surveillance training
feed.summary: EagleNXT (NYSE: UAVS) announced that the U.S. Army has selected two of its eBee VISION UAS systems for advanced unmanned systems training. These lightweight, NDAA-compliant fixed-wing drones offer up to 90 minutes of endurance, real-time high-resolution video, and a portable design, making them ideal for field training and enhancing the Army's ISR capabilities. The acquisition aims to improve operator proficiency and integration exercises for the next generation of warfighters.

feed.title: MDJM heads to OTC trading as Nasdaq suspension takes effect March 20
feed.summary: MDJM LTD (UOKA) announced that its shares will be suspended from Nasdaq trading effective March 20, 2026, due to failing to maintain a closing bid price of $0.10 or above for 10 consecutive business days. The company plans to request a hearing before an independent Nasdaq Hearings Panel and expects its securities to be eligible for trading on the OTC Markets during this period. MDJM previously effected a 1-for-25 reverse stock split on March 16, 2026, as it explores options to regain Nasdaq compliance.

feed.title: Hormel Foods Unveils Top 5 Pizza Trends for 2026: Calabrian Chili, Brisket, and Global Fusion Lead the Menu
feed.summary: Hormel Foods has announced its top five pizza trends for 2026, ahead of the International Pizza Expo. These trends highlight the growing consumer demand for specialized heat like Calabrian chili, premium proteins such as brisket, and globally inspired "passport pies." The company emphasizes the strategic importance of Limited Time Offers (LTOs) and innovative crusts in driving customer interest and traffic.

feed.title: United's new Dreamliner puts 99 premium seats on Singapore route
feed.summary: United Airlines has started selling tickets for its new Boeing 787-9 Dreamliner, featuring 99 premium seats and eight Polaris Studio suites. The inaugural international flight on this "Elevated" interior aircraft will be from San Francisco to Singapore on April 22, 2026. This move highlights United's focus on product differentiation and upgrading its long-haul service with enhanced amenities like 27-inch 4K OLED screens and lie-flat seating.

feed.title: Hanskin Lands in 1,400 ULTA Beauty Stores, Bringing Glass Skin Hydration to the U.S.
feed.summary: K-Beauty brand Hanskin is significantly expanding its North American presence by launching in approximately 1,400 ULTA Beauty stores across the United States. This move brings its bestselling Hyaluron Skin Essence, known for achieving a glass skin glow, to a broader consumer base. Hanskin is also introducing advanced biotech-driven PDRN skincare, including the Ara Lotus PDRN Hyaluron Glow Serum, which utilizes a proprietary plant-based PDRN technology for enhanced elasticity and radiance.

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Lowers Holdings in Qualcomm Incorporated $QCOM
feed.summary: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd has reduced its stake in Qualcomm Incorporated by 10% in the third quarter, now holding 452,762 shares valued at $75.32 million. Despite this, Qualcomm's board recently approved a new $20 billion stock repurchase authorization and increased its dividend, signaling management's confidence and commitment to shareholder returns. Analyst opinions are mixed, with some upgrading the stock due to undervaluation while others express concerns over slowing smartphone volumes and competitive pressures.

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Sells 8,582 Shares of Darden Restaurants, Inc. $DRI
feed.summary: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd has reduced its stake in Darden Restaurants, Inc. (NYSE:DRI) by 2.5%, selling 8,582 shares and now owning 337,383 shares valued at $64.22 million. Several other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in DRI, while company insiders Susan M. Connelly and John W. Wilkerson sold shares worth a combined total of over $1 million. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating on Darden Restaurants with an average target price of $224.63.

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Buys 26,628 Shares of The Progressive Corporation $PGR

The firm now holds 240,599 shares valued at approximately $59.42 million. Amidst other institutional investments, hedge funds and institutional investors now collectively own 85.34% of Progressive's outstanding stock, with the company recently declaring a quarterly dividend of $0.10 per share.

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Decreases Stock Position in Philip Morris International Inc. $PM
feed.summary: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd reduced its stake in Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE:PM) by 4.3% in the third quarter, now owning 734,628 shares valued at $119 million. Other institutional investors showed mixed activity, with some increasing and others reducing their positions. Insider transactions included significant stock sales by CEO Jacek Olczak and CFO Emmanuel Babeau in February, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $196.83.

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Decreases Stock Position in Cisco Systems, Inc. $CSCO

Despite this, several other institutional investors increased their positions in Cisco. Analysts generally maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target price of $89.55 for the stock.

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Decreases Position in Pfizer Inc. $PFE
feed.summary: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd has reduced its stake in Pfizer Inc. by 2.2% during the third quarter, now holding 5,702,699 shares valued at $145,305,000. Institutional investors collectively own 68.36% of Pfizer's stock, and analysts currently have a "Hold" consensus rating with an average target price of $28.14. Recent positive developments for Pfizer include strong Phase 3 and Phase 2 oncology trial results, alongside an analyst upgrade from HSBC.

feed.title: Tevis Investment Management Invests $1.67 Million in ONEOK, Inc. $OKE
feed.summary: Tevis Investment Management recently acquired 22,845 shares of ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE:OKE) valued at approximately $1.67 million during the third quarter. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their holdings in the utilities provider. Analysts have mixed ratings on ONEOK, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target price of $86.60, while the company recently increased its quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Buys 1,781 Shares of BlackRock $BLK
feed.summary: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd increased its stake in BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) by 1.5% during the third quarter, purchasing an additional 1,781 shares, bringing its total ownership to 117,961 shares valued at $137.5 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in BlackRock, with significant increases from the California Public Employees Retirement System and Ontario Teachers Pension Plan Board. BlackRock recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating consensus estimates, and declared an increased quarterly dividend of $5.73 per share.

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Decreases Holdings in Altria Group, Inc. $MO
feed.summary: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd has reduced its stake in Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE:MO) by 0.5% in the 3rd quarter, selling 25,142 shares and now owning 4,664,986 shares worth over $308 million. Despite this decrease, the stock remains a significant part of their portfolio. feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Has $57.56 Million Stock Holdings in Automatic Data Processing, Inc. $ADP
feed.summary: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd reduced its stake in Automatic Data Processing (ADP) by 3.3% in Q3, holding shares valued at $57.56 million. Despite ADP beating Q3 earnings estimates and announcing a $6 billion share buyback and a $1.70 quarterly dividend, several analysts have lowered price targets, resulting in a "Hold" consensus rating. feed.title: Gilead Sciences, Inc. $GILD Shares Bought by Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd

feed.title: Truist Financial Corporation $TFC Stock Holdings Decreased by Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Decreases Position in PACCAR Inc. $PCAR
feed.summary: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd has reduced its stake in PACCAR Inc. by 3.2% in the third quarter, now holding 292,751 shares valued at approximately $28.8 million. This comes amidst significant insider selling, with CFO Brice Poplawski and CEO R. Preston Feight selling a combined total of over 11,400 shares recently. Despite a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts and PACCAR meeting EPS estimates while beating revenue forecasts, the company's revenue declined 15.1% year-over-year.

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Purchases 4,631 Shares of Parker-Hannifin Corporation $PH

Parker-Hannifin reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst expectations with $7.65 EPS and a 9.1% year-over-year revenue increase. Analysts maintain a largely positive outlook for the company, with many rating the stock as "Buy" and setting an average target price near $995.

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Raises Position in Cadence Design Systems, Inc. $CDNS
feed.summary: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd increased its stake in Cadence Design Systems, Inc. by 6.9% in Q3 2025, bringing its total to 97,294 shares valued at $34.18 million. Other institutional investors like Norges Bank and Massachusetts Financial Services also made significant investments, contributing to the 84.85% institutional ownership of the stock. Cadence Design Systems reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and provided positive Q1 and full-year 2026 guidance, maintaining a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts.

feed.title: BXP, Inc. (NYSE:BXP) to Issue $0.70 Quarterly Dividend
feed.summary: BXP, Inc. (NYSE:BXP) has announced a quarterly dividend of $0.70 per share, payable on April 30th to shareholders of record on March 31st, resulting in an annualized yield of approximately 5.3%. While the current payout ratio of 147.4% indicates that dividends exceed current earnings, analysts project earnings per share of $7.27 next year, which would allow the company to comfortably cover its $2.80 annual dividend with a projected payout ratio of 38.5%. BXP's shares were down about 1% following the announcement, trading near its 12-month low.

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Purchases 68,565 Shares of Bristol Myers Squibb Company $BMY
feed.summary: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd has increased its stake in Bristol Myers Squibb Company, acquiring an additional 68,565 shares, bringing its total holding to 1,142,844 shares valued at over $51 million. This increase makes Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd own approximately 0.06% of the company's stock. Bristol Myers Squibb recently reported quarterly earnings of $1.26 EPS, missing the consensus estimate, but its revenue slightly exceeded expectations, and it offers a quarterly dividend with a 4.2% yield.

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Buys 6,045 Shares of Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated $VRTX

feed.title: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd Buys 56,535 Shares of The TJX Companies, Inc. $TJX
feed.summary: Swiss Life Asset Management Ltd increased its stake in The TJX Companies, Inc. by 19.9%, acquiring an additional 56,535 shares to hold a total of 341,023 shares valued at approximately $49.29 million. Analyst sentiment remains positive for TJX, with a "Buy" consensus rating and a target price of $167.55, following the company's strong fiscal performance that exceeded Q4 expectations and provided optimistic FY2027 guidance. Notably, CEO Ernie Herrman sold 30,000 shares worth about $4.83 million.

feed.title: VNET Group (NASDAQ: VNET) files Form 144 to sell 150,000 ADS
feed.summary: VNET Group, Inc. has filed a Form 144 with the SEC, indicating its intent to sell 150,000 American Depositary Shares (ADS) on NASDAQ. Each ADS represents six Class A ordinary shares. The filing, dated March 20, 2026, lists previous vesting events for ADS allocations and serves as a notice of a proposed resale under Rule 144, not a completed transaction.

feed.title: Industrial Fasteners Market size to hit $189.9 Billion by 2035 |
feed.summary: The industrial fasteners market is projected to grow from USD 109.6 billion in 2025 to USD 189.9 billion by 2035, exhibiting a CAGR of 6.3%. This growth is driven by increasing industrialization, infrastructure development, and demand for high-performance fastening solutions across sectors like automotive, construction, and aerospace. Key trends include a shift towards lightweight and high-performance materials, integration of automation, focus on sustainability, and rising demand from renewable energy projects.

feed.title: Smucker (J.M.) Co. Stock (ISIN: US8326964058) Faces Headwinds Amid Mixed Analyst Views and Segment Pressures
feed.summary: J.M. Smucker Co. (ISIN: US8326964058) stock is currently trading around $101, facing challenges from its Hostess acquisition and rising input costs, despite recent earnings beats. Analysts offer mixed views, with a "Hold" consensus but price targets suggesting over 20% upside. The company's 4.3% dividend yield appeals to income-focused European investors, though segment weaknesses and valuation concerns persist.

feed.title: Evercore ISI Adjusts Blackstone PT to $135 From $170, Maintains Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has lowered its price target for Blackstone (BX) to $135 from $170, while reiterating an Outperform rating on the stock. The article mentions that detailed content is reserved for members. It also provides a snapshot of Blackstone's business activities, including investment fund management, insurance, and real estate asset management, noting the company managed $1,274.9 billion in assets by the end of 2025.

feed.title: Zoom, Ross Stores And A Big Bank On CNBC's 'Final Trades'
feed.summary: Bryn Talkington picked Zoom Communications (NASDAQ: ZM) as a "final trade" after Needham analyst Joshua Reilly reiterated a Buy rating. Jim Lebenthal named Citigroup (NYSE: C), which plans an IPO of its Mexican retail banking unit. Joseph Terranova recommended Ross Stores (NASDAQ: ROST) following its better-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings.

feed.title: Tcfg Wealth Management LLC Grows Stock Holdings in UnitedHealth Group Incorporated $UNH
feed.summary: Tcfg Wealth Management LLC significantly increased its stake in UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) by 2,463.1% in Q3, bringing its total to 16,942 shares valued at $5.85 million. UnitedHealth Group reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst expectations with $2.11 EPS and $113.73 billion in revenue, and set its FY2026 guidance at $17.75 EPS. Despite recent analyst target trims, the stock maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $372.13.

feed.title: RBC Cuts Price Target on Sherwin-Williams to $376 From $390, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets has reduced its price target for Sherwin-Williams (SHW) shares to $376 from $390 but maintained an "Outperform" rating. This adjustment comes despite the firm reiterating its positive outlook on the paint and coatings company. The article also mentions other recent analyst actions, including Argus lowering its price target and Berenberg raising its target.

feed.title: Pfizer posts late-stage trial win for prostate cancer drug
feed.summary: Pfizer announced a successful late-stage trial for its cancer drug regimen, Talzenna plus Xtandi, for a new indication in prostate cancer. The regimen met its primary endpoint in a Phase 3 study. Xtandi is jointly marketed by Pfizer and Astellas.

feed.title: Who's Moving Where In Wealth Management? – RBC WM, Raymond James
feed.summary: RBC Wealth Management – US has added the Turnock Bonacci Group, which managed nearly $360 million in client assets, to its Annapolis, Maryland branch. Separately, a former LPL Financial team managing $385 million in client money has moved to Raymond James' independent advisor arm, operating as SBS Financial in Moline, Illinois. Additionally, Kirk Bell was named president of Raymond James Financial Services' independent contractor division, effective April 1.

feed.title: Titan International Q4 2025 earnings preview
feed.summary: The article "Titan International Q4 2025 earnings preview" indicates that Titan International will soon release its fourth-quarter 2025 earnings report. However, no specific details or forecasts regarding the earnings are provided within the current content.

feed.title: Texas Roadhouse (TXRH) director Carroll sells shares, holds future RSU awards
feed.summary: Texas Roadhouse director Hugh J. Carroll sold 988 shares of common stock at $170.96 per share, reducing his direct ownership to 866 common shares. Despite the sale, Carroll retains significant future equity exposure through Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) that are set to vest on July 2, 2026 (2,667 units) and January 8, 2027 (1,200 units), subject to his continued service with the company. This transaction was reported in an SEC Form 4 filing, indicating moderate impact and negative sentiment due to the sale.

feed.title: Titan America (TTAM) Margin Improvement To 11.1% Tests Skeptical Project Risk Narratives
feed.summary: Titan America (TTAM) reported a strong FY 2025 with revenue of US$1.7 billion and EPS of US$1.01, achieving an 11.1% net margin and 11.7% earnings growth. This performance, especially the improved margins, challenges skeptical views regarding project risks and capital intensity in the industry. The company currently trades at a P/E of 15.6x, significantly below its DCF fair value of US$31.15, suggesting it may be undervalued despite revenue growth forecasts being below the broader US market.

The company, known for its Wattbike, CLMBR, and FORME fitness brands, advises shareholders to visit its website for email updates regarding new information. This update also highlights the potential risks and uncertainties associated with the Sportstech acquisition and other corporate actions.
